chinese_news.title: 理想出牌：全新L9上市，45.98万元起｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车CEO 李想

能让李想豁出去跳舞挣眼球的发布会，仅在全新一代理想L9上市。

5月15日，理想发布会了全新一代理想L9，推出两个版本——理想L9 livis，售价 50.98万元；理想L9 Ultra版，售价45.98万元。且理想给出了现金2万元的首销权益，截止于6月30日。

chinese_news.title: 36氪联合PureblueAI清蓝发布「2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册」丨AI时代，品牌如何抢占「推荐力」新战场？
chinese_news.summary:
当你打算入手一部新手机、一台冰箱，或是一瓶面霜时，你的第一个动作是什么？是打开电商平台浏览，还是搜索测评文章？当前，越来越多人的选择是：直接问AI。

“20-30万预算，有什么新能源轿车推荐？”“哪款手机拍照更好？”“敏感肌适用什么洁面？”……这些曾经需要查阅大量攻略、对比无数参数的消费决策，如今正被一个个简洁的AI问答窗口所承接。DeepSeek、豆包、通义千问、腾讯元宝等主流AI助手，正以前所未有的深度渗透进我们的消费生活，成为事实上的“第一入口”和“前置决

chinese_news.title: 长安计划入股千里科技，千里智驾与奥迪推进合作｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，千里科技正积极与长安、奥迪、奇瑞等车企，洽谈智能化合作。

其中，长安不仅有意向搭载千里科技辅助驾驶方案，还计划入股千里科技，双方原定于今年年初完成股权变更。但目前，据知情人士透露，该计划暂无实质性进展。

36氪了解到，北汽是千里科技眼下最具确定性的外部客户，双方计划于今年内成立合资公司。

千里科技与北汽计划合作5款车型，其中包含一款轿车，一款越野车型，还有一款轿跑猎装版。其中部分车型计划于今年发布。

除长安、北汽之外，传统高端品牌奥迪、安徽地方国企奇瑞等车企，也在与千里科技商谈辅助驾驶领域的合作。

千里科技与奥迪的合作较为深入。今年北京车展上，千里科技发布了与北汽合作的汽车品牌”游心“，这与华为和车企的合作模式类似。在这个合作思路下，除了北汽，千里科技也在和奥迪推进合作。

在智能座舱领域，千里科技在与传统豪华品牌奔驰讨论合作。有知情人士告诉36氪：“双方正在谈的，大概率是平台化合作，不止是针对某几款车型。从千里科技为奔驰准备的方案可以看出，都是

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜航天发动机核心部件厂商获投，国内唯一具备核心部件一站式制造能力的民营企业
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京思创航天精密制造有限公司（以下简称“思创航天”）近日完成新一轮数千万元融资，由丹诚资本独家投资。

思创航天前身为沈阳融创精密制造有限公司航天项目中心（融创精密为上市公司富创精密全资子公司），早在2020年3月便已开始参与航天发动机零部件制造业务，并于2025年正式独立成立公司。

目前，公司专注于航天发动机、卫星及其他航天产品核心零部件的精密制造。主要客户包括星河动力、星际荣耀、东方空间、大航跃迁、中船重工、沈阳铸造所等。

团队方面，公司创始人徐曙宁曾任沈阳富创事业部高级总监和融创航天项目中心总经理。当前团队70余人，其中核心团队均来自原航天项目中心，具备较强的技术延续性与工程协同能力。

随着国内商业航天逐渐进入批量化、低成本、高效率快速迭代竞争阶段，发动机制造环节的重要性持续提升。相比过去以单点零部件供应为主的模式，行业对于核心部组件设计与制造协同、多

chinese_news.title: 挪瓦咖啡2025年营收7至8亿元，利润约为6千万元 | 独家
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 钟艺璇

编辑 | 乔芊

36氪从多个独立信源独家获悉，挪瓦咖啡2025年营收7至8亿元，利润约为6千万元。

2025年是挪瓦咖啡规模迅速扩张的一年，从2024年底的1200多家，到2025年底突破1万家，挪瓦咖啡也顺势成为中国第四个咖啡万店品牌。

和对手不同，挪瓦咖啡多数门店采用店中店模式，挪瓦咖啡合伙人李立旭不久前曾公开提到，挪瓦咖啡目前80%是店中店，20%左右是专卖店。所谓店中店，即把咖啡业务嵌入便利店、网吧、加油站等点位的模式——合作门店出场地、出店员，挪瓦则提供物料和设备，前者赚取咖啡业务带来的额外收入，后者则从原料差价中盈利。

“对于便利店而言，一不需要购买重资产，二能利用挪瓦的线上流量卖咖啡，三对于部分原先就有咖啡业务但销量不佳的连锁便利店来说，也是对咖啡机等闲置资产的再利用。”一位行业人士告诉36氪。而对于挪瓦咖啡，较低的建店成本，也成为其突破万店规模的关键因素。

但店中店模式的核心问题，也在于品控。在店中店模式下，挪瓦咖啡并未专门雇佣店员，而是直

chinese_news.title: 麦记牛奶谢永亮：2025年是唯一窗口期，糖水赛道胜负已定｜厚雪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 钟艺璇
编辑 | 乔芊

2025年，糖水这个老品类突然火了一把。

这个赛道的代表公司是麦记牛奶公司、赵记传承，它们在过去一年的门店增长数约为1000家、300家。尤其麦记牛奶，2025年初，它的门店数量只有53家，一年后，它已经成为糖水赛道门店数量最多的品牌。

另一边则是许久尚未增长的老玩家。截止今天，成立于1995年的满记甜品门店约为200家，鲜芋仙2009年进入中国大陆，目前拥有门店500余家。过去数十年，它们几乎没有太大的变化与创新。

糖水这个品类究竟发生了什么？以麦记牛奶为例的公司又抓住了什么机会？

2021年，创始人徐康在浙江湖州开了第一家麦记牛奶，用牛奶做唯一底料，让地域性较强的传统糖水在口感上变得温和。2024年底，谢永亮关注到了这家公司，当时麦记创始团队的办公地还是湖州南浔的一个共享办公室，团队人数寥寥。

在麦记牛奶之前，谢永亮做过超级加盟商，也投过许多餐饮品牌，他说，自己一直在寻找有产品差异化、但

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signal rate cuts before September 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Inflation expectations muddy under Warsh; Q2 forecast at 6%; Trump-Xi talks on trade deals

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump administration reach a confirmed trade deal with China worth >$50 billion by October 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump-Xi talks announced as 'very successful' but no deals confirmed; energy/oil trade discussions ongoing but unresolved

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Starbucks laying off 300 U.S. employees and shuttering regional offices explicitly to 'return to profitable growth'—this is a clear margin recovery signal that markets have priced as already baked in, but execution risk is real.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reports Starbucks cost-cutting moves specifically tied to margin recovery; Q1/Q2 guidance will set expectations

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin volatility (30-day realized, annualized) exceed 80% by July 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Bond yield spikes, inflation at 6%, Fed rate-cut uncertainty, and Trump-China trade talks create overlapping macro volatility drivers; crypto market is currently pricing single-direction risk, not straddle.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BTC tumbles on bond yields; Treasury 30-year hits 5.1%; Cointelegraph notes trader divergence on $82k resistance

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 by June 30, 2026?

investment_theses.thesis: Long USD/DXY and short BTC on Q2 inflation prints >5.8% and Fed Chair Warsh hawkish surprise before June 30, 2026.
supporting_signals: 30-year Treasury yield just hit 5.1%, highest in ~1 year
Top forecasters survey projects Q2 inflation at 6%
New Fed Chair Warsh facing conflicting signals; market has not priced in sustained hawkishness
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump-Xi trade deal could ease supply-chain inflation; energy secretary signaling China to buy more U.S. oil, reducing Middle East premium and supporting commodity disinflation.
investment_theses.expression: Short BTC/USDT perps 3x; long DXY via currency ETF (UUP); pair with long 10Y Treasury (IEF) to hedge duration

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVDA and short BTC if Cerebras IPO stumble + auto job cuts signal AI capex peak and rotation to established cloud/AI infrastructure names.
supporting_signals: Cerebras stock fell 10% post-IPO debut, signaling market skepticism on AI chip sprawl
Detroit automakers cut 20k+ salaried jobs on AI displacement fears, not expansion
Bill Ackman building MSFT stake on AI/cloud growth thesis—institutional flight to quality
investment_theses.counter_view: Cerebras decline may be IPO pop/lock-up timing rather than AI demand collapse; chip cycle historically recovers fast; NVIDIA guidance and data center orders could re-accelerate.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA calls (3–6 month); short BTC spot or perps; monitor Q2 2026 earnings for data center growth rates

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH relative to BTC (ETH/BTC ratio up) if South Korea tokenized securities rules launch on schedule in July 2026, unlocking institutional on-chain settlement.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph reports South Korea plans July 2026 rules for tokenized securities
OKX and Korean partners moving on tokenized asset infrastructure
ETH underperforming BTC on macro uncertainty, but regulatory clarity could flip ratio
investment_theses.counter_view: South Korea rules may be delayed (regulatory creep common); Ethereum network upgrade or competitor L1s (Sui, Solana) could capture settlement flow instead of mainnet ETH.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via spot or futures (e.g., long 1 ETH, short 0.05 BTC equivalent); pair with long Korean tech ETF (EWY) for regulatory beta

investment_theses.thesis: Short consumer discretionary (XLY, SPY growth tilt) if Q2 inflation stays >5.5% and Fed Warsh signals no imminent rate cuts; Starbucks / auto layoffs are early warning.
supporting_signals: Starbucks laying off 300 U.S. employees, closing offices—margin pressure despite cost cuts
Detroit automakers cut 20k+ jobs; consumer exposure to labor softness rising
Q2 inflation forecast at 6%; real wages eroding; discretionary demand at risk
investment_theses.counter_view: Bond yields spiking may be temporary; Trump-China trade deal could unlock confidence; Starbucks cost-cuts may unlock margin expansion, driving re-rating.
investment_theses.expression: Short SPY or QQQ call spreads; long TLT/IEF duration hedge; consider long gold (GLD) as inflation hedge

investment_theses.thesis: Long crypto regulatory clarity plays (XRP, HYPE token) if Senate crypto bill advances and Polish lawmakers' revised bill signals Europe moving toward harmonization by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: XRP rallies 5% on Senate bill; CLARITY Act passing Congress
Polish lawmakers back revised crypto bill after repeated vetoes—EU momentum building
Kraken/Payward cutting staff to streamline for IPO; institutional on-ramps maturing
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory bills historically stall or dilute; 2025–2026 political cycles may delay U.S. clarity; Europe's MiCA rules could stifle rather than accelerate token liquidity.
investment_theses.expression: Long XRP spot or 3-month calls; long HYPE spot (recent 23% surge suggests momentum, but liquidity/size risks); monitor Senate bill roll call votes for catalyst timing
